title: Nigerian president signs order on approach to crypto regulation, taxes
summary: The West African country’s executive order established a virtual asset council and addressed the fragmentation of crypto regulation for oversight and enforcement.

title: Bernstein raises Robinhood price target, cites tokenization and prediction markets
summary: The brokerage’s blockchain strategy, including tokenized equities and its Arbitrum-based Robinhood Chain, could reduce its reliance on traditional crypto trading, analysts said.

title: Gilts Rattled by New UK PM’s Comment on Fiscal Flexibility
summary: Gilts extended their retreat and the pound slipped after UK Prime Minister Andy Burnham said he will seek “any flexibility” in the government’s fiscal rules, stoking concerns his administration will add to the nation’s already-heavy debt load.

title: Money Funds Keep Cash Closer as Fed Leaves Markets Guessing
summary: Money‑market funds are shifting toward ultra short-term holdings and away from assets with even modest interest-rate risk as uncertainty grows over the Federal Reserve’s policy path and the near-term outlook for rates.

title: New Onramp Report Makes the Case for Spot Bitcoin Over Paper Claims as Price Sits at Half Its Peak
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

New Onramp Report Makes the Case for Spot Bitcoin Over Paper Claims as Price Sits at Half Its Peak

title: Strive (ASST) Adds 21 Bitcoin as Treasury Reaches 19,921 BTC and Cash Climbs to $157 Million
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Strive (ASST) Adds 21 Bitcoin as Treasury Reaches 19,921 BTC and Cash Climbs to $157 Million
Strive (ASST) bought 21 bitcoin for about $1.3 million last week, increasing its treasury to 19,921 BTC while cash reserves rose to $157.4 million, according to a Monday SEC filing.

title: Tom Lee's Bitmine Taps the Brakes on ETH Buys, Pivots $86M Into Stock Buyback
summary: "The reduced pace of buys reflects that Bitmine repurchased 5.5 million common shares," Bitmine Chairman Tom Lee said in a statement.

title: Strategy Pads Cash Reserve By $225M With MSTR Sale, Bitcoin Stash Remains Untouched
summary: For the second consecutive week, Saylor's company sold MSTR stock instead of BTC to pad its reserves to $3.2 billion.

title: Benchmark backs Exodus after 25% workforce cut, says stablecoin pivot is being overlooked
summary: Late Friday afternoon, Exodus said it expects the restructuring to generate $10 million to $13 million in annualized cost savings.

title: Hut 8 fully commercializes 1 GW Texas AI campus with second $9.8B lease as IREN signs $2.8B in contracts; shares climb double digits
summary: Hut 8 and IREN shares climb on fresh AI data center deals worth billions as the bitcoin-to-AI pivot continues to accelerate.

title: US petrol prices climb back above $4 as Iran war intensifies
summary: Resurgent costs drive frustration with President Donald Trump ahead of midterm elections

title: Yemen’s Houthi rebels threaten blockade against Saudi Arabia
summary: Renewed fighting puts kingdom’s crude exports through Red Sea at risk
